question: 查询已完成订单的总数量
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count FROM sales_orders WHERE order_status = 'completed'

question: 查询有多少种不同的产品线
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT product_line) AS product_line_count FROM dim_products

question: 查询2026年1月的总研发费用
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(rd_expense) AS total_rd FROM finance_expenses WHERE expense_date >= '2026-01-01' AND expense_date < '2026-02-01'

question: 按客户类型统计已完成订单数量
expected_sql: SELECT c.customer_type, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_type
description: 两表 Join 与分组聚合

question: 按产品线统计人民币总收入
expected_sql: SELECT p.product_line, SUM(o.net_amount * r.rate_to_cny) AS total_revenue FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id JOIN exchange_rates r ON o.currency = r.currency AND DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(r.rate_date, '%Y-%m') WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.product_line

question: 查询欧洲市场2026年第二季度总收入
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(o.net_amount * r.rate_to_cny) AS total_revenue FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN exchange_rates r ON o.currency = r.currency AND DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(r.rate_date, '%Y-%m') WHERE c.region = '欧洲' AND o.order_status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2026-04-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-07-01'

question: 按大区统计2026年第二季度总收入（人民币口径）
expected_sql: SELECT c.region, SUM(o.net_amount * r.rate_to_cny) AS total_revenue_cny FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN exchange_rates r ON o.currency = r.currency AND DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(r.rate_date, '%Y-%m') WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2026-04-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-07-01' GROUP BY c.region
description: 三表 Join、汇率、时间与分组

question: 按产品线统计平均客单价和订单数量
expected_sql: SELECT p.product_line, SUM(o.net_amount * r.rate_to_cny) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id), 0) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS order_count FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id JOIN exchange_rates r ON o.currency = r.currency AND DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(r.rate_date, '%Y-%m') WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.product_line

question: 查询2026年6月的销售额、销售成本及毛利
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(o.net_amount * r.rate_to_cny) AS revenue, SUM((p.material_cost + p.labor_cost) * o.quantity) AS cost, SUM(o.net_amount * r.rate_to_cny) - SUM((p.material_cost + p.labor_cost) * o.quantity) AS gross_profit FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id JOIN exchange_rates r ON o.currency = r.currency AND DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(r.rate_date, '%Y-%m') WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2026-06-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-07-01'
